title: Safe Luxury Fitting Room Mirror Selfie AI
sourceTitle: Safe Luxury Fitting Room Mirror Selfie AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Single 9:16 RAW phone mirror selfie at a fictional upscale try-on event, featuring adult fashion customer in minimalist satin lounge set with robe, fully covered non-explicit styling. Subject: adult fashion customer in minimalist satin lounge set with robe, fully covered non-explicit styling is the clearly adult fashion customer, fully covered and non-explicit, taking a quick outfit-check selfie on a phone for a friend rather than posing for a commercial shoot. Scene: luxury try-on suite, soft mirror reflection, handbag and folded garment details, candid friend-message energy creates the luxury fitting-room context with mirror reflection, warm lights, soft textiles, personal styling details, and candid SNS realism. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 phone mirror selfie composition: subject holds phone naturally, mirror reflection is believable, fitting-room details frame the body, crop feels quick and casual, and the image reads as a RAW private outfit-check snapshot. Signature Elements: Luxury fitting room, phone mirror selfie, warm mirror lights, cream curtains, robe or covered lounge set, folded garment details, personal handbag, candid friend-message energy, and RAW SNS-photo feel. Style: Genuine candid SNS RAW photo, luxury fitting-room try-on event, natural phone-camera imperfections, soft mirror light, non-commercial realism, upscale fashion customer mood, and friend-message spontaneity. Color Palette: Warm cream fitting-room neutrals, silk or satin fabric sheen, soft gold mirror lights, marble or polished shelf accents, muted handbag and garment tones, and natural phone-photo color. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: SOFT SKIN RITUAL may appear only as a subtle fictional event card, garment tag, or mirror sticker; keep it small, legible, and secondary to the candid selfie. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
